We are creating a virtual representation of Echos of Emperors to run .

Use the *_base_EN.pdf files for the card list for each civilization, and deck list urls from links.md to help support.
The maps are defined in StartingTiles.pdf and Constantinople.pdf
The rules are defined in rulebook_en.pdf

Directions:  take extra time to examine the rulebook and understand the game flow, phases, and turn structure. Pay special attention to the different card types (units, buildings, actions) and how they interact.  Use this information to structure the architecture and design of the project as a whole.

Access the URLs in links.md to gather more information about the game, including any FAQs, errata, or community discussions that can provide additional context and insights into the gameplay and mechanics.
